title: ObsidianSlab
description: Just the Obsidian Slab from Consistency+
body:
Just the Obsidian Slab from Consistency+ - Requested by DragonEggBedrockBreaking - Uploaded with approval of the other members of the team.

IMS (Yes, Iris Shaders IMS), a member of the C+ team at the time was the guy in charge of alot of the actual code when making the inital block, I only separated this from the main mod, so most of the credit goes to him.
